💕 A Letter My Komuuu 💕

Mere is Mohabbat ki kitab per tumhara jikr karne ki ijaajat dogi kya...

Apne balon mein Apne hathon se gajra sajane ki ijaajat dogi kya...

Ek Sapna Hai Mera tumhari aankhon mein Kho jaane ka — Mujhe Kho jaane dogi kya...

Ek Khwab Hai Mera Apne hathon mein tumhara hath Rakh ke kuchh waqt chalne ki ijaajat dogi kya...

Jab Tak siyahi bachi hai mere kalam mein — Mere Mohabbat ki kitab per apna jikr karne dogi kya...

Forever yours,
shiv 💖
💕 💖 💕
